name: WuXi Xinje Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: WuXi Xinje Electric Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of industrial automation products in China. The company offers PLC, human-machine interface, integrated controller, special modules, and other products for industrial control; and server system, stepping system, inverter for sport control. It also provides WIFI modules, 4GBOX, and other wireless communication modules, as well as Ethernet-based communication modules; cloud platform and server deployment; and integrated smart cameras manipulators, robot controllers, and teaching pendants. The company's products are used in various fields of automation, including printing and packaging, food and drink, machining assembly, textile, electronics manufacturing, building materials, machine tool, and other related industries and fields. WuXi Xinje Electric Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is based in Wuxi, China.
